Utica's First Seed Oil-Free Kitchen

Wholesome as it is
delicious.

At Bagg's Square in downtown Utica. We craft premium French dips, slow-roasted beef, and hand-cut hormone-free chicken cooked exclusively in 100% chemical-free beef tallow, unrefined coconut oil, and real grass-fed butter.

Explore The Menu Hours & Directions
100% Chemical-Free Tallow Local Heidelburg Rolls 0% Industrial Seed Oils
Seed / Oil / Free
Beef BBQ Atw
100% Beef Tallow Fried
Flavor Vision

The Gourmet Sandwich Vision

At Beef & Bird, we envision the perfect fusion of premium ingredients and artisanal craftsmanship to create unforgettable sandwiches. Our commitment to no seed oils ensures superior flavor and health-conscious choices.

Every bite reflects our passion for culinary excellence, from hand-trimmed cuts to local rolls, delivered fresh daily.

  • Hand-Trimmed daily
  • Heidelburg Round Rolls
  • Chemical-Free Tallow
  • No Seed Oils Ever

BEEF & BIRD

NO CLUCKS GIVEN
Closed
Monday Closed
Tuesday 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Wednesday 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Thursday 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Friday 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Saturday 12:00 PM – 7:00 PM
Sunday Closed
Find Us in Bagg's Square

106 Genesee St.

Located at the heart of Utica's historic Bagg's Square district, Beef & Bird welcomes you to savor the finest flavors crafted with care and quality.

106 Genesee St, Utica, NY 13502

Official Menu Board

Our Culinary Standards
We specialize in high-quality beef and chicken, locally sourced rolls and house-made fresh breads, and we fry exclusively in 100% chemical-free beef tallow. No seed oils are used in any part of our cooking process.

All prices listed are cash prices. A non-cash adjustment of up to 4% is applied to credit card purchases.

Why Seed Oil-Free?

"I believe it's time to start paying attention to what we're eating, what's in the ingredients."

What We Cook With

Beef Tallow

Rich in flavor and naturally stable for cooking.

Real Butter

Pure, grass-fed, adding rich creaminess.

Coconut Oil

Unrefined and chemical-free for deep flavor.

100% Wholesome Comfort

What We Never Touch

  • Canola & Rapeseed Oils 0% Present
  • Soybean & Vegetable Oils 0% Present
  • Sunflower & Corn Oils 0% Present
No Clucks Given to Cheap Fats
30 Years of Culinary Legacy

Tucker Rosemyer

Tucker’s passion for culinary excellence spans over three decades, shaping every bite served at Beef & Bird. His dedication to quality and flavor excellence brings a legacy of delicious innovation and unwavering standards.

  • Slice Pizzeria
  • 1886 Prime
  • The Purple Cow
  • Tucker's Italian
  • Karma Piano Bar
A Science and an Art

I've got it down to a science.

My decades of experience have taught me that the perfect chicken sandwich and roast beef isn't just cooking — it’s precision, high-quality ingredients, and respect for tradition all working in harmony.

No Shortcuts, Just Quality

The Heat Stability Factor

The Science of Flavor

BEEF & BIRD

At Beef & Bird, we cherish quality, tradition, and Utica’s spirit in every dish we create.

Our Promise to Utica

We pledge to serve only wholesome, meticulously prepared dishes using the finest ingredients, honoring our community’s health and taste buds.
